item.title: 10.12]別再旁觀你的生命了！隱性拖延症有多可怕？5個心理學，馬上變得自律！
item.itunes:title: 10.12]別再旁觀你的生命了！隱性拖延症有多可怕？5個心理學，馬上變得自律！
item.itunes:author: 維思維WeisWay
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4-mgDhqNYmE 【想支撐創作：歡迎加入會員】 https://bit.ly/2CoCFFD 【目錄】 00:00 引言 02:10 什麼是拖延症 03:49 舵手與猴子 05:56 拖延症者的大腦 09:37 隱藏的拖延症 11:09 如何真正解決拖延症 16:22 精選留言 ---------------------------- 【其他平台按這裡】 官方網站： 思維島 https://www.ways-island.com Facebook： 維思維 https://www.facebook.com/weisway18/ IG ：weisway18 https://www.instagram.com/weisway18/ Ganjingworld：維思維 WeisWay https://bit.ly/3E94Wvv ---------------------------- 【參考資料】 https://club.commonhealth.com.tw/article/1169?from=article-83856\u0026_ga=2.16883450.273954031.1727749445-1211406404.1727749445\u0026pk_vid=82a8a7b0988814811727749499d46b94 | 做計畫，不過是為了拖延行動｜大人社團 - 與你一起實踐美好生活 https://www.ted.com/talks/tim_urban_inside_the_mind_of_a_master_procrastinator/transcript?language=zh-tw\u0026subtitle=en | 提姆．厄本: 拖延大師的腦子在想什麼 | TED Talk https://www.jcthplus.org/article/why-do-we-procrastinate | jcthplus.org/article/why-do-we-procrastinate https://journals.sagepub.com/doi/abs/10.1177/0146167213488214 | Similar Psychological Distance Reduces Temporal Discounting - Hyunji Kim, Simone Schnall, Mathew P. White, 2013 https://www.scirp.org/reference/referencespapers?referenceid=1288522 | van Eerde, W. (2000). Procrastination Self-Regulation in Initiating Avserive Goals. Applied Psychology An International Review, 49, 372-389. - References - Scientific Research Publishing https://psycnet.apa.org/record/2005-03779-001 | Prevalence of Procrastination in the United States, United Kingdom, and Australia: Arousal and Avoidance Delays among Adults. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=arj7oStGLkU | Inside the Mind of a Master Procrastinator | Tim Urban | TED - YouTube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=48jlHaxZnig | How to Stop Procrastination \u0026 Increase Motivation | Dr. Andrew Huberman - YouTube https://www.ted.com/speakers/tim_urban#:~:text=Tim%20Urban%20has%20become%20one,famous%20fans%20like%20Elon%20Musk. | Tim Urban | Speaker | TED https://waitbutwhy.com/ | Wait But Why
item.description: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4-mgDhqNYmE 【想支撐創作：歡迎加入會員】 https://bit.ly/2CoCFFD 【目錄】 00:00 引言 02:10 什麼是拖延症 03:49 舵手與猴子 05:56 拖延症者的大腦 09:37 隱藏的拖延症 11:09 如何真正解決拖延症 16:22 精選留言 ---------------------------- 【其他平台按這裡】 官方網站： 思維島 https://www.ways-island.com Facebook： 維思維 https://www.facebook.com/weisway18/ IG ：weisway18 https://www.instagram.com/weisway18/ Ganjingworld：維思維 WeisWay https://bit.ly/3E94Wvv ---------------------------- 【參考資料】 https://club.commonhealth.com.tw/article/1169?from=article-83856\u0026_ga=2.16883450.273954031.1727749445-1211406404.1727749445\u0026pk_vid=82a8a7b0988814811727749499d46b94 | 做計畫，不過是為了拖延行動｜大人社團 - 與你一起實踐美好生活 https://www.ted.com/talks/tim_urban_inside_the_mind_of_a_master_procrastinator/transcript?language=zh-tw\u0026subtitle=en | 提姆．厄本: 拖延大師的腦子在想什麼 | TED Talk https://www.jcthplus.org/article/why-do-we-procrastinate | jcthplus.org/article/why-do-we-procrastinate https://journals.sagepub.com/doi/abs/10.1177/0146167213488214 | Similar Psychological Distance Reduces Temporal Discounting - Hyunji Kim, Simone Schnall, Mathew P. White, 2013 https://www.scirp.org/reference/referencespapers?referenceid=1288522 | van Eerde, W. (2000). Procrastination Self-Regulation in Initiating Avserive Goals. Applied Psychology An International Review, 49, 372-389. - References - Scientific Research Publishing https://psycnet.apa.org/record/2005-03779-001 | Prevalence of Procrastination in the United States, United Kingdom, and Australia: Arousal and Avoidance Delays among Adults. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=arj7oStGLkU | Inside the Mind of a Master Procrastinator | Tim Urban | TED - YouTube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=48jlHaxZnig | How to Stop Procrastination \u0026 Increase Motivation | Dr. Andrew Huberman - YouTube https://www.ted.com/speakers/tim_urban#:~:text=Tim%20Urban%20has%20become%20one,famous%20fans%20like%20Elon%20Musk. | Tim Urban | Speaker | TED https://waitbutwhy.com/ | Wait But Why
item.content:encoded:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4-mgDhqNYmE
【想支撐創作：歡迎加入會員】
https://bit.ly/2CoCFFD

【目錄】
00:00 引言
02:10 什麼是拖延症
03:49 舵手與猴子
05:56 拖延症者的大腦
09:37 隱藏的拖延症
11:09 如何真正解決拖延症
16:22 精選留言

----------------------------
【其他平台按這裡】
官方網站： 思維島
https://www.ways-island.com

Facebook： 維思維 
https://www.facebook.com/weisway18/ 

IG ：weisway18 
https://www.instagram.com/weisway18/

Ganjingworld：維思維 WeisWay
https://bit.ly/3E94Wvv

----------------------------
【參考資料】
https://club.commonhealth.com.tw/article/1169?from=article-83856\u0026_ga=2.16883450.273954031.1727749445-1211406404.1727749445\u0026pk_vid=82a8a7b0988814811727749499d46b94 | 做計畫，不過是為了拖延行動｜大人社團 - 與你一起實踐美好生活
https://www.ted.com/talks/tim_urban_inside_the_mind_of_a_master_procrastinator/transcript?language=zh-tw\u0026subtitle=en | 提姆．厄本: 拖延大師的腦子在想什麼 | TED Talk
https://www.jcthplus.org/article/why-do-we-procrastinate | jcthplus.org/article/why-do-we-procrastinate
https://journals.sagepub.com/doi/abs/10.1177/0146167213488214 | Similar Psychological Distance Reduces Temporal Discounting - Hyunji Kim, Simone Schnall, Mathew P. White, 2013
https://www.scirp.org/reference/referencespapers?referenceid=1288522 | van Eerde, W. (2000). Procrastination Self-Regulation in Initiating Avserive Goals. Applied Psychology An International Review, 49, 372-389. - References - Scientific Research Publishing
https://psycnet.apa.org/record/2005-03779-001 | Prevalence of Procrastination in the United States, United Kingdom, and Australia: Arousal and Avoidance Delays among Adults.
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=arj7oStGLkU | Inside the Mind of a Master Procrastinator | Tim Urban | TED - YouTube
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=48jlHaxZnig | How to Stop Procrastination \u0026 Increase Motivation | Dr. Andrew Huberman - YouTube
https://www.ted.com/speakers/tim_urban#:~:text=Tim%20Urban%20has%20become%20one,famous%20fans%20like%20Elon%20Musk. | Tim Urban | Speaker | TED
https://waitbutwhy.com/ | Wait But Why

item.title: 10.5]為什麼你非常需要無聊？【心理學】
item.itunes:title: 10.5]為什麼你非常需要無聊？【心理學】
item.itunes:author: 維思維WeisWay
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LRzmfz61F80 官方網站： 思維島 https://www.ways-island.com 歡迎加入會員： https://bit.ly/2CoCFFD 【目錄】 00:00 引言 01:18 什麼是無聊 02:18 你是哪種無聊 04:30 為什麼人會無聊 06:18 為什麼你的生活越來越無聊 07:42 你需要無聊的原因 08:32 3個無聊解方 11:06 結語 11:44 精選留言 ---------------------------- 【其他平台按這裡】 Facebook： 維思維 https://www.facebook.com/weisway18/ IG ：weisway18 https://www.instagram.com/weisway18/ Ganjingworld：維思維 WeisWay https://bit.ly/3E94Wvv ---------------------------- 【參考資料】 Fenichel, O., \u0026 Rapaport, D. (2012). On the psychology of boredom. Organization \u0026 Pathology of Thought, 18, 349-361. Eastwood, J.D.; Frischen, A.; Fenske, M.J.; Smilek, D. The unengaged mind: Defining boredom in terms of attention. Perspect. Psychol. Sci. 2012, 7, 482–495. Doehlemann, M. (1991). Langeweile? Deutung eines verbreiteten Phänomens. Frankfurt. Chin, A., Markey, A., Bhargava, S., Kassam, K. S., \u0026 Loewenstein, G. (2017). Bored in the USA: Experience sampling and boredom in everyday life. Emotion (Washington, D.C.), 17(2), 359–368. https://doi.org/10.1037/emo0000232 Danckert, J., \u0026 Eastwood, J. D. (2020). Out of my skull: The psychology of boredom. Harvard University Press. https://doi.org/10.4159/9780674247079 Zajonc, R.B. 2001. \"Mere Exposure: A Gateway To The Subliminal\". Current Directions In Psychological Science 10 (6): 224-228. https://doi.org/10.1111/1467-8721.00154.
item.description: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LRzmfz61F80 官方網站： 思維島 https://www.ways-island.com 歡迎加入會員： https://bit.ly/2CoCFFD 【目錄】 00:00 引言 01:18 什麼是無聊 02:18 你是哪種無聊 04:30 為什麼人會無聊 06:18 為什麼你的生活越來越無聊 07:42 你需要無聊的原因 08:32 3個無聊解方 11:06 結語 11:44 精選留言 ---------------------------- 【其他平台按這裡】 Facebook： 維思維 https://www.facebook.com/weisway18/ IG ：weisway18 https://www.instagram.com/weisway18/ Ganjingworld：維思維 WeisWay https://bit.ly/3E94Wvv ---------------------------- 【參考資料】 Fenichel, O., \u0026 Rapaport, D. (2012). On the psychology of boredom. Organization \u0026 Pathology of Thought, 18, 349-361. Eastwood, J.D.; Frischen, A.; Fenske, M.J.; Smilek, D. The unengaged mind: Defining boredom in terms of attention. Perspect. Psychol. Sci. 2012, 7, 482–495. Doehlemann, M. (1991). Langeweile? Deutung eines verbreiteten Phänomens. Frankfurt. Chin, A., Markey, A., Bhargava, S., Kassam, K. S., \u0026 Loewenstein, G. (2017). Bored in the USA: Experience sampling and boredom in everyday life. Emotion (Washington, D.C.), 17(2), 359–368. https://doi.org/10.1037/emo0000232 Danckert, J., \u0026 Eastwood, J. D. (2020). Out of my skull: The psychology of boredom. Harvard University Press. https://doi.org/10.4159/9780674247079 Zajonc, R.B. 2001. \"Mere Exposure: A Gateway To The Subliminal\". Current Directions In Psychological Science 10 (6): 224-228. https://doi.org/10.1111/1467-8721.00154.
item.content:encoded:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LRzmfz61F80
官方網站： 思維島
https://www.ways-island.com

歡迎加入會員：
https://bit.ly/2CoCFFD

【目錄】
00:00 引言
01:18 什麼是無聊
02:18 你是哪種無聊
04:30 為什麼人會無聊
06:18 為什麼你的生活越來越無聊
07:42 你需要無聊的原因
08:32 3個無聊解方
11:06 結語
11:44 精選留言

----------------------------
【其他平台按這裡】

Facebook： 維思維 
https://www.facebook.com/weisway18/ 

IG ：weisway18 
https://www.instagram.com/weisway18/

Ganjingworld：維思維 WeisWay
https://bit.ly/3E94Wvv

----------------------------
【參考資料】
Fenichel, O., \u0026 Rapaport, D. (2012). On the psychology of boredom. Organization \u0026 Pathology of Thought, 18, 349-361.

Eastwood, J.D.; Frischen, A.; Fenske, M.J.; Smilek, D. The unengaged mind: Defining boredom in terms of attention. Perspect. Psychol. Sci. 2012, 7, 482–495.

Doehlemann, M. (1991). Langeweile? Deutung eines verbreiteten Phänomens. Frankfurt.

Chin, A., Markey, A., Bhargava, S., Kassam, K. S., \u0026 Loewenstein, G. (2017). Bored in the USA: Experience sampling and boredom in everyday life. Emotion (Washington, D.C.), 17(2), 359–368. https://doi.org/10.1037/emo0000232

Danckert, J., \u0026 Eastwood, J. D. (2020). Out of my skull: The psychology of boredom. Harvard University Press. https://doi.org/10.4159/9780674247079

Zajonc, R.B. 2001. \"Mere Exposure: A Gateway To The Subliminal\". Current Directions In Psychological Science 10 (6): 224-228. https://doi.org/10.1111/1467-8721.00154.

item.title: 9.24]吃播一哥用「2年預錄影片」騙過全網！肥胖是假的？人為何愛看吃播 Mukbang？
item.itunes:title: 9.24]吃播一哥用「2年預錄影片」騙過全網！肥胖是假的？人為何愛看吃播 Mukbang？
item.itunes:author: 維思維WeisWay
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=EJXCs1yhCrs Nikocado Avocado 的故事與吃播的心理學。 ------------------------ 【想支撐創作：歡迎加入會員】 https://bit.ly/2CoCFFD 【目錄】 00:00 引言 01:59 Nikocado Avocado 崛起與實驗 10:42 這到底是真的嗎？ 11:46 人為何愛看吃播？ 16:19 精選留言 ---------------------------- 【其他平台按這裡】 官方網站： 思維島 https://www.ways-island.com Facebook： 維思維 https://www.facebook.com/weisway18/ IG ：weisway18 https://www.instagram.com/weisway18/ Ganjingworld：維思維 WeisWay https://bit.ly/3E94Wvv ---------------------------- 【參考資料】 https://www.nytimes.com/2024/09/11/style/nikocado-avocado-youtuber-weight-loss.html | Who Is Nikocado Avocado, the YouTuber Who Revealed Weight Loss? - The New York Times https://www.youtube.com/@NikocadoAvocado/videos | Nikocado Avocado - YouTube https://www.youtube.com/@NikocadoAvocado3/videos | Nikocado Avocado 3 - YouTube https://www.youtube.com/@NoodleKing/videos | Noodle King - YouTube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OO1H4a_ROz8 | Nikocado Avocado on his Mental Illness | The Dish With Trish Podcast - YouTube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=40SeGkDfDnw | This Won’t End Well… D-Fire Podcast #1 - YouTube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AgVc3p9b2YA | I'm Getting Fat \u0026 Don't Know Why - YouTube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=k6IyjaZjYNk | Panda Express • MUKBANG - YouTube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bAPFK9KKEOc | Nikocado Avocado Playing Violin (Before YouTube Fame) - YouTube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mWyge9qsLeA | Say Hello To My Double Chin - YouTube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=S914DcC3lyI | We Broke Up. - YouTube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=N6A_sNiLBk8 | My New Diet As A Disabled Person. - YouTube https://melmagazine.com/en-us/story/nikocado-avocado-onlyfans-profile | Nikocado Avocado OnlyFans: How Real Does He Get on the Platform? https://english.elpais.com/society/2022-05-02/the-extreme-show-of-the-youtuber-who-gained-100-kilos-before-the-cameras.html | english.elpais.com/society/2022-05-02/the-extreme-show-of-the-youtuber-who-gained-100-kilos-before-the-cameras.html https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=D6hi9b8vfEU | MCDONALD'S ANIMAL STYLE FRIES • Mukbang \u0026 Recipe - YouTube https://www.nbcnews.com/pop-culture/pop-culture-news/nikocado-avocado-secret-weight-loss-rcna170142 | YouTuber Nikocado Avocado bamboozles viewers with secret weight loss transformation https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OO1H4a_ROz8\u0026t=35s | Nikocado Avocado on his Mental Illness | The Dish With Trish Podcast - YouTube https://www.youtube.com/shorts/Lo9LUGkWE_g | Am I Fat...? 😡 #shorts - YouTube https://www.tiktok.com/@realnikocadoavocado/video/7415777500963376427 | TikTok - Make Your Day https://www.tiktok.com/@realnikocadoavocado/video/7413222155741105450 | TikTok - Make Your Day https://www.tiktok.com/@realnikocadoavocado/video/7412100810475048234 | TikTok - Make Your Day https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UImLU8IVzSs | 【Ai直播换脸】 技术已经越来越成熟了！现阶段可以看看有没有跳舞的牙齿，还能分辨，将来就不知道了！#ai换脸 - YouTube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DzgL2hwqaHk\u0026t=304s | 52nd Birthday Feast With Nikocado Avocado Outback Steakhouse Mukbang - YouTube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DzgL2hwqaHk\u0026t=438s | 52nd Birthday Feast With Nikocado Avocado Outback Steakhouse Mukbang - YouTube

https://english.elpais.com/society/2022-05-02/the-extreme-show-of-the-youtuber-who-gained-100-kilos-before-the-cameras.html | english.elpais.com/society/2022-05-02/the-extreme-show-of-the-youtuber-who-gained-100-kilos-before-the-cameras.html https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=D6hi9b8vfEU | MCDONALD'S ANIMAL STYLE FRIES • Mukbang \u0026 Recipe - YouTube https://www.nbcnews.com/pop-culture/pop-culture-news/nikocado-avocado-secret-weight-loss-rcna170142 | YouTuber Nikocado Avocado bamboozles viewers with secret weight loss transformation https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OO1H4a_ROz8\u0026t=35s | Nikocado Avocado on his Mental Illness | The Dish With Trish Podcast - YouTube https://www.youtube.com/shorts/Lo9LUGkWE_g | Am I Fat...? 😡 #shorts - YouTube https://www.tiktok.com/@realnikocadoavocado/video/7415777500963376427 | TikTok - Make Your Day https://www.tiktok.com/@realnikocadoavocado/video/7413222155741105450 | TikTok - Make Your Day https://www.tiktok.com/@realnikocadoavocado/video/7412100810475048234 | TikTok - Make Your Day https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UImLU8IVzSs | 【Ai直播换脸】 技术已经越来越成熟了！现阶段可以看看有没有跳舞的牙齿，还能分辨，将来就不知道了！#ai换脸 - YouTube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DzgL2hwqaHk\u0026t=304s | 52nd Birthday Feast With Nikocado Avocado Outback Steakhouse Mukbang - YouTube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DzgL2hwqaHk\u0026t=438s | 52nd Birthday Feast With Nikocado Avocado Outback Steakhouse Mukbang - YouTube
item.content:encoded:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=EJXCs1yhCrs
Nikocado Avocado 的故事與吃播的心理學。
------------------------
【想支撐創作：歡迎加入會員】
https://bit.ly/2CoCFFD

【目錄】
00:00 引言
01:59 Nikocado Avocado 崛起與實驗
10:42 這到底是真的嗎？
11:46 人為何愛看吃播？
16:19 精選留言

Facebook： 維思維

IG ：weisway18

----------------------------
【參考資料】
https://www.nytimes.com/2024/09/11/style/nikocado-avocado-youtuber-weight-loss.html | Who Is Nikocado Avocado, the YouTuber Who Revealed Weight Loss? - The New York Times
https://www.youtube.com/@NikocadoAvocado/videos | Nikocado Avocado - YouTube
https://www.youtube.com/@NikocadoAvocado3/videos | Nikocado Avocado 3 - YouTube
https://www.youtube.com/@NoodleKing/videos | Noodle King - YouTube
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OO1H4a_ROz8 | Nikocado Avocado on his Mental Illness | The Dish With Trish Podcast - YouTube

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AgVc3p9b2YA | I'm Getting Fat \u0026 Don't Know Why - YouTube
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=k6IyjaZjYNk | Panda Express • MUKBANG - YouTube
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bAPFK9KKEOc | Nikocado Avocado Playing Violin (Before YouTube Fame) - YouTube
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mWyge9qsLeA | Say Hello To My Double Chin - YouTube
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=S914DcC3lyI | We Broke Up. - YouTube
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=N6A_sNiLBk8 | My New Diet As A Disabled Person. - YouTube
https://melmagazine.com/en-us/story/nikocado-avocado-onlyfans-profile | Nikocado Avocado OnlyFans: How Real Does He Get on the Platform?
https://english.elpais.com/society/2022-05-02/the-extreme-show-of-the-youtuber-who-gained-100-kilos-before-the-cameras.html | english.elpais.com/society/2022-05-02/the-extreme-show-of-the-youtuber-who-gained-100-kilos-before-the-cameras.html
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=D6hi9b8vfEU | MCDONALD'S ANIMAL STYLE FRIES • Mukbang \u0026 Recipe - YouTube
https://www.nbcnews.com/pop-culture/pop-culture-news/nikocado-avocado-secret-weight-loss-rcna170142 | YouTuber Nikocado Avocado bamboozles viewers with secret weight loss transformation
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OO1H4a_ROz8\u0026t=35s | Nikocado Avocado on his Mental Illness | The Dish With Trish Podcast - YouTube
https://www.youtube.com/shorts/Lo9LUGkWE_g | Am I Fat...? 😡 #shorts - YouTube
https://www.tiktok.com/@realnikocadoavocado/video/7415777500963376427 | TikTok - Make Your Day
https://www.tiktok.com/@realnikocadoavocado/video/7413222155741105450 | TikTok - Make Your Day
https://www.tiktok.com/@realnikocadoavocado/video/7412100810475048234 | TikTok - Make Your Day
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UImLU8IVzSs | 【Ai直播换脸】 技术已经越来越成熟了！现阶段可以看看有没有跳舞的牙齿，还能分辨，将来就不知道了！#ai换脸 - YouTube
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DzgL2hwqaHk\u0026t=304s | 52nd Birthday Feast With Nikocado Avocado Outback Steakhouse Mukbang - YouTube
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DzgL2hwqaHk\u0026t=438s | 52nd Birthday Feast With Nikocado Avocado Outback Steakhouse Mukbang - YouTube

item.title: 9.14]你對生活感到無助嗎？什麼是「習得性無助」？是種心病嗎？
item.itunes:title: 9.14]你對生活感到無助嗎？什麼是「習得性無助」？是種心病嗎？
item.itunes:author: 維思維WeisWay
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zUh8U6XrDms 你是否感到人生無助？ ------------------------ 【想支撐創作：歡迎加入會員】 https://bit.ly/2CoCFFD 【目錄】 00:00 引言 00:56 起源實驗 02:59 學生噪音實驗 05:10 什麼是習得性無助 06:56 習得性無助是一種病嗎 07:35 習得無助的原因 09:53 如何改善 12:00 精選留言 ---------------------------- 【其他平台按這裡】 官方網站： 思維島 https://www.ways-island.com Facebook： 維思維 https://www.facebook.com/weisway18/ IG ：weisway18 https://www.instagram.com/weisway18/ Ganjingworld：維思維 WeisWay https://bit.ly/3E94Wvv ---------------------------- 【參考資料】 https://www.psychologytoday.com/us/basics/optimism | Optimism | Psychology Today https://www.psychologytoday.com/us/basics/learned-helplessness#:~:text=Learned%20helplessness%20occurs%20when%20an,try%20and%20fail%20to%20quit. | Learned Helplessness | Psychology Today https://www.psychologytoday.com/us/blog/talking-about-trauma/201408/when-enough-is-enough-adult-entitled-dependence | When Enough Is Enough: Adult Entitled Dependence | Psychology Today https://www.annualreviews.org/content/journals/10.1146/annurev.me.23.020172.002203;jsessionid=yudNMJZgHOCWW2EFQia4s1e4xajkqji5SiN2U2Nt.annurevlive-10-241-10-69 | Learned Helplessness | Annual Reviews https://psycnet.apa.org/search/display?id=f741ec33-6a7e-9b02-3341-3296a03a958b\u0026recordId=3\u0026tab=PA\u0026page=1\u0026display=25\u0026sort=PublicationYearMSSort%20desc,AuthorSort%20asc\u0026sr=1 | APA PsycNet https://www.brisbanewellbeing.com.au/the-invisible-shackles-of-learned-helplessness/ | The Invisible Shackles of Learned Helplessness | Brisbane Wellbeing Psychologists https://www.semanticscholar.org/paper/Learned-helplessness%3A-Theory-and-evidence.-Maier-Seligman/bd0b38c23bb66a0762b0023b0306c86411f47edc?p2df | [PDF] Learned helplessness: Theory and evidence. | Semantic Scholar https://www.appstate.edu/~steelekm/classes/psy5300/Documents/Hiroto1974-learned-helplessness.pdf | appstate.edu/~steelekm/classes/psy5300/Documents/Hiroto1974-learned-helplessness.pdf https://ppc.sas.upenn.edu/sites/default/files/learnedhelplessness.pdf | Learned Helplessness https://www.semanticscholar.org/paper/Learned-helplessness-in-humans%3A-critique-and-Abramson-Seligman/ef52775276f83a46162a9b364335d9ee5ee73b99?p2df | [PDF] Learned helplessness in humans: critique and reformulation. | Semantic Scholar https://psycnet.apa.org/record/1975-10978-001 | APA PsycNet https://www.betterup.com/blog/learned-helplessness | What Is Learned Helplessness, and How Do You ‘Unlearn’ It? https://www.simplypsychology.org/learned-helplessness.html | Learned Helplessness: Seligman's Theory of Depression https://positivepsychology.com/explanatory-styles-optimism/#:~:text=A%20global%20attribution%20occurs%20when,or%20setting%20of%20the%20experience. | What Are Attributional and Explanatory Styles in Psychology? https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Attribution_(psychology) | Attribution (psychology) - Wikipedia https://positivepsychology.com/learned-helplessness-seligman-theory-depression-cure/ | Learned Helplessness: Seligman’s Theory of Depression https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/abs/pii/B9780128093245064750 | Learned Helplessness - ScienceDirect https://www.medicalnewstoday.com/articles/325355#symptoms | Learned helplessness: Examples, symptoms, and treatment
item.description: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zUh8U6XrDms 你是否感到人生無助？ ------------------------ 【想支撐創作：歡迎加入會員】 https://bit.ly/2CoCFFD 【目錄】 00:00 引言 00:56 起源實驗 02:59 學生噪音實驗 05:10 什麼是習得性無助 06:56 習得性無助是一種病嗎 07:35 習得無助的原因 09:53 如何改善 12:00 精選留言 ---------------------------- 【其他平台按這裡】 官方網站： 思維島 https://www.ways-island.com Facebook： 維思維 https://www.facebook.com/weisway18/ IG ：weisway18 https://www.instagram.com/weisway18/ Ganjingworld：維思維 WeisWay https://bit.ly/3E94Wvv ---------------------------- 【參考資料】 https://www.psychologytoday.com/us/basics/optimism | Optimism | Psychology Today https://www.psychologytoday.com/us/basics/learned-helplessness#:~:text=Learned%20helplessness%20occurs%20when%20an,try%20and%20fail%20to%20quit. | Learned Helplessness | Psychology Today https://www.psychologytoday.com/us/blog/talking-about-trauma/201408/when-enough-is-enough-adult-entitled-dependence | When Enough Is Enough: Adult Entitled Dependence | Psychology Today https://www.annualreviews.org/content/journals/10.1146/annurev.me.23.020172.002203;jsessionid=yudNMJZgHOCWW2EFQia4s1e4xajkqji5SiN2U2Nt.annurevlive-10-241-10-69 | Learned Helplessness | Annual Reviews https://psycnet.apa.org/search/display?id=f741ec33-6a7e-9b02-3341-3296a03a958b\u0026recordId=3\u0026tab=PA\u0026page=1\u0026display=25\u0026sort=PublicationYearMSSort%20desc,AuthorSort%20asc\u0026sr=1 | APA PsycNet https://www.brisbanewellbeing.com.au/the-invisible-shackles-of-learned-helplessness/ | The Invisible Shackles of Learned Helplessness | Brisbane Wellbeing Psychologists https://www.semanticscholar.org/paper/Learned-helplessness%3A-Theory-and-evidence.-Maier-Seligman/bd0b38c23bb66a0762b0023b0306c86411f47edc?p2df | [PDF] Learned helplessness: Theory and evidence. | Semantic Scholar https://www.appstate.edu/~steelekm/classes/psy5300/Documents/Hiroto1974-learned-helplessness.pdf | appstate.edu/~steelekm/classes/psy5300/Documents/Hiroto1974-learned-helplessness.pdf https://ppc.sas.upenn.edu/sites/default/files/learnedhelplessness.pdf | Learned Helplessness https://www.semanticscholar.org/paper/Learned-helplessness-in-humans%3A-critique-and-Abramson-Seligman/ef52775276f83a46162a9b364335d9ee5ee73b99?p2df | [PDF] Learned helplessness in humans: critique and reformulation. | Semantic Scholar https://psycnet.apa.org/record/1975-10978-001 | APA PsycNet https://www.betterup.com/blog/learned-helplessness | What Is Learned Helplessness, and How Do You ‘Unlearn’ It? https://www.simplypsychology.org/learned-helplessness.html | Learned Helplessness: Seligman's Theory of Depression https://positivepsychology.com/explanatory-styles-optimism/#:~:text=A%20global%20attribution%20occurs%20when,or%20setting%20of%20the%20experience. | What Are Attributional and Explanatory Styles in Psychology? https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Attribution_(psychology) | Attribution (psychology) - Wikipedia https://positivepsychology.com/learned-helplessness-seligman-theory-depression-cure/ | Learned Helplessness: Seligman’s Theory of Depression https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/abs/pii/B9780128093245064750 | Learned Helplessness - ScienceDirect https://www.medicalnewstoday.com/articles/325355#symptoms | Learned helplessness: Examples, symptoms, and treatment
item.content:encoded:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zUh8U6XrDms
你是否感到人生無助？
------------------------
【想支撐創作：歡迎加入會員】
https://bit.ly/2CoCFFD

【目錄】
00:00 引言
00:56 起源實驗
02:59 學生噪音實驗
05:10 什麼是習得性無助
06:56 習得性無助是一種病嗎
07:35 習得無助的原因
09:53 如何改善
12:00 精選留言

----------------------------
【其他平台按這裡】
官方網站： 思維島
https://www.ways-island.com

Facebook： 維思維 
https://www.facebook.com/weisway18/ 

IG ：weisway18 
https://www.instagram.com/weisway18/

Ganjingworld：維思維 WeisWay
https://bit.ly/3E94Wvv

----------------------------
【參考資料】
https://www.psychologytoday.com/us/basics/optimism | Optimism | Psychology Today
https://www.psychologytoday.com/us/basics/learned-helplessness#:~:text=Learned%20helplessness%20occurs%20when%20an,try%20and%20fail%20to%20quit. | Learned Helplessness | Psychology Today
https://www.psychologytoday.com/us/blog/talking-about-trauma/201408/when-enough-is-enough-adult-entitled-dependence | When Enough Is Enough: Adult Entitled Dependence | Psychology Today
https://www.annualreviews.org/content/journals/10.1146/annurev.me.23.020172.002203;jsessionid=yudNMJZgHOCWW2EFQia4s1e4xajkqji5SiN2U2Nt.annurevlive-10-241-10-69 | Learned Helplessness | Annual Reviews
https://psycnet.apa.org/search/display?id=f741ec33-6a7e-9b02-3341-3296a03a958b\u0026recordId=3\u0026tab=PA\u0026page=1\u0026display=25\u0026sort=PublicationYearMSSort%20desc,AuthorSort%20asc\u0026sr=1 | APA PsycNet
https://www.brisbanewellbeing.com.au/the-invisible-shackles-of-learned-helplessness/ | The Invisible Shackles of Learned Helplessness | Brisbane Wellbeing Psychologists
https://www.semanticscholar.org/paper/Learned-helplessness%3A-Theory-and-evidence.-Maier-Seligman/bd0b38c23bb66a0762b0023b0306c86411f47edc?p2df | [PDF] Learned helplessness: Theory and evidence. | Semantic Scholar
https://www.appstate.edu/~steelekm/classes/psy5300/Documents/Hiroto1974-learned-helplessness.pdf | appstate.edu/~steelekm/classes/psy5300/Documents/Hiroto1974-learned-helplessness.pdf
https://ppc.sas.upenn.edu/sites/default/files/learnedhelplessness.pdf | Learned Helplessness
https://www.semanticscholar.org/paper/Learned-helplessness-in-humans%3A-critique-and-Abramson-Seligman/ef52775276f83a46162a9b364335d9ee5ee73b99?p2df | [PDF] Learned helplessness in humans: critique and reformulation. | Semantic Scholar
https://psycnet.apa.org/record/1975-10978-001 | APA PsycNet
https://www.betterup.com/blog/learned-helplessness | What Is Learned Helplessness, and How Do You ‘Unlearn’ It?
https://www.simplypsychology.org/learned-helplessness.html | Learned Helplessness: Seligman's Theory of Depression
https://positivepsychology.com/explanatory-styles-optimism/#:~:text=A%20global%20attribution%20occurs%20when,or%20setting%20of%20the%20experience. | What Are Attributional and Explanatory Styles in Psychology?
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Attribution_(psychology) | Attribution (psychology) - Wikipedia
https://positivepsychology.com/learned-helplessness-seligman-theory-depression-cure/ | Learned Helplessness: Seligman’s Theory of Depression
https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/abs/pii/B9780128093245064750 | Learned Helplessness - ScienceDirect
https://www.medicalnewstoday.com/articles/325355#symptoms | Learned helplessness: Examples, symptoms, and treatment

item.title: 8.24]討好他人有病嗎？為何「討好」正在摧毀你？和憂鬱症有關？
item.itunes:title: 8.24]討好他人有病嗎？為何「討好」正在摧毀你？和憂鬱症有關？
item.itunes:author: 維思維WeisWay
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oA3qgGYDVVo 討好型人格並非疾病，但可能成為壓力與焦慮的根源。經常壓抑自我、迎合他人，會讓你迷失真正的需求。從小學會討好以換取認可，成年後在職場和社交中，這種行為更容易讓人疲憊不堪。改善方法包括設定界線、從小事學會拒絕，以及展現真實的自我。避免因過度討好而陷入憂鬱，學會珍惜自己和他人之間的健康關係，找到生活的平衡點。 ------------------------ 【想支撐創作：歡迎加入會員】 https://bit.ly/2CoCFFD 【目錄】 00:00 引言 01:21 什麼是討好型人格 02:59 討好型人格的故事 05:14 討好型人格的特徵 07:17 討好型人格與心理疾病的關係 08:27 討好型人格是怎麼形成的 10:19 改善方法 12:04 精選留言 ---------------------------- 【其他平台按這裡】 官方網站： 思維島 https://www.ways-island.com Facebook： 維思維 https://www.facebook.com/weisway18/ IG ：weisway18 https://www.instagram.com/weisway18/ Ganjingworld：維思維 WeisWay https://bit.ly/3E94Wvv ---------------------------- 【參考資料】 http://www.zmlcdc.com/plus/view.php?aid=103 | 讨好型人格大都具有的五个特征 https://treehole.hk/psychology/%E8%A8%8E%E5%A5%BD%E5%9E%8B%E4%BA%BA%E6%A0%BC/?srsltid=AfmBOorZlw9DRYCJ60_3ooA8yPQ5pimCvZYsWivGpgdUW6KICgXOdB3y | 害怕得罪別人？你是討好型人格嗎？ | 樹洞香港 | TreeholeHK https://wiki.mbalib.com/zh-tw/%E8%AE%A8%E5%A5%BD%E5%9E%8B%E4%BA%BA%E6%A0%BC#_ref-0 | 討好型人格 - MBA智库百科 https://baike.baidu.com/item/%E8%AE%A8%E5%A5%BD%E5%9E%8B%E4%BA%BA%E6%A0%BC/23695835#reference-9 | 讨好型人格（心理学名词）_百度百科 https://www.webmd.com/mental-health/what-is-a-people-pleaser | What Is a People Pleaser? https://coveteur.com/people-pleasing | People Pleasing: Self-Preservation or Manipulation? - Coveteur: Inside Closets, Fashion, Beauty, Health, and Travel https://psychcentral.com/health/the-need-to-please-the-psychology-of-people-pleasing | Psychology of People Pleasers https://www.psychologytoday.com/us/basics/people-pleasing | People-Pleasing | Psychology Today https://scielo.org.za/scielo.php?script=sci_arttext\u0026pid=S2078-67862015000200004#:~:text=Sociotropy%20is%20a%20personality%20trait,the%20field%20of%20social%20psychology. | Sociotropic personality traits positively correlate with the severity of social anxiety https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sociotropy | Sociotropy - Wikipedia https://www.verywellmind.com/how-to-stop-being-a-people-pleaser-5184412 | 8 Ways to Stop Being a People-Pleaser https://www.choosingtherapy.com/people-pleaser/ | People Pleaser: Definition, Signs, \u0026 How to Stop https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/16986139/#:~:text=Sociotropy%20and%20autonomy%20are%20conceptualized,with%20personal%20achievement%20and%20control. | Sociotropy-autonomy and interpersonal problems - PubMed https://www.counselling-directory.org.uk/memberarticles/people-pleasing-what-it-is-and-how-to-stop | People pleasing: what it is and how to stop - Counselling Directory https://www.heatherhayes.com/the-disease-to-please/#_ftn1 | The Disease to Please: Hypervigilance Around Others’ Needs - Heather Hayes \u0026 Associates https://www.marieclaire.com.tw/lifestyle/book/76130/people-pleaser | 你有「討好型人格」嗎？為什麼一旦面對別人的請求，就無法拒絕？
item.description: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oA3qgGYDVVo 討好型人格並非疾病，但可能成為壓力與焦慮的根源。經常壓抑自我、迎合他人，會讓你迷失真正的需求。從小學會討好以換取認可，成年後在職場和社交中，這種行為更容易讓人疲憊不堪。改善方法包括設定界線、從小事學會拒絕，以及展現真實的自我。避免因過度討好而陷入憂鬱，學會珍惜自己和他人之間的健康關係，找到生活的平衡點。 ------------------------ 【想支撐創作：歡迎加入會員】 https://bit.ly/2CoCFFD 【目錄】 00:00 引言 01:21 什麼是討好型人格 02:59 討好型人格的故事 05:14 討好型人格的特徵 07:17 討好型人格與心理疾病的關係 08:27 討好型人格是怎麼形成的 10:19 改善方法 12:04 精選留言 ---------------------------- 【其他平台按這裡】 官方網站： 思維島 https://www.ways-island.com Facebook： 維思維 https://www.facebook.com/weisway18/ IG ：weisway18 https://www.instagram.com/weisway18/ Ganjingworld：維思維 WeisWay https://bit.ly/3E94Wvv ---------------------------- 【參考資料】 http://www.zmlcdc.com/plus/view.php?aid=103 | 讨好型人格大都具有的五个特征 https://treehole.hk/psychology/%E8%A8%8E%E5%A5%BD%E5%9E%8B%E4%BA%BA%E6%A0%BC/?srsltid=AfmBOorZlw9DRYCJ60_3ooA8yPQ5pimCvZYsWivGpgdUW6KICgXOdB3y | 害怕得罪別人？你是討好型人格嗎？ | 樹洞香港 | TreeholeHK https://wiki.mbalib.com/zh-tw/%E8%AE%A8%E5%A5%BD%E5%9E%8B%E4%BA%BA%E6%A0%BC#_ref-0 | 討好型人格 - MBA智库百科 https://baike.baidu.com/item/%E8%AE%A8%E5%A5%BD%E5%9E%8B%E4%BA%BA%E6%A0%BC/23695835#reference-9 | 讨好型人格（心理学名词）_百度百科 https://www.webmd.com/mental-health/what-is-a-people-pleaser | What Is a People Pleaser? https://coveteur.com/people-pleasing | People Pleasing: Self-Preservation or Manipulation? - Coveteur: Inside Closets, Fashion, Beauty, Health, and Travel https://psychcentral.com/health/the-need-to-please-the-psychology-of-people-pleasing | Psychology of People Pleasers https://www.psychologytoday.com/us/basics/people-pleasing | People-Pleasing | Psychology Today https://scielo.org.za/scielo.php?script=sci_arttext\u0026pid=S2078-67862015000200004#:~:text=Sociotropy%20is%20a%20personality%20trait,the%20field%20of%20social%20psychology. | Sociotropic personality traits positively correlate with the severity of social anxiety https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sociotropy | Sociotropy - Wikipedia https://www.verywellmind.com/how-to-stop-being-a-people-pleaser-5184412 | 8 Ways to Stop Being a People-Pleaser https://www.choosingtherapy.com/people-pleaser/ | People Pleaser: Definition, Signs, \u0026 How to Stop https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/16986139/#:~:text=Sociotropy%20and%20autonomy%20are%20conceptualized,with%20personal%20achievement%20and%20control. | Sociotropy-autonomy and interpersonal problems - PubMed https://www.counselling-directory.org.uk/memberarticles/people-pleasing-what-it-is-and-how-to-stop | People pleasing: what it is and how to stop - Counselling Directory https://www.heatherhayes.com/the-disease-to-please/#_ftn1 | The Disease to Please: Hypervigilance Around Others’ Needs - Heather Hayes \u0026 Associates https://www.marieclaire.com.tw/lifestyle/book/76130/people-pleaser | 你有「討好型人格」嗎？為什麼一旦面對別人的請求，就無法拒絕？
item.content:encoded:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oA3qgGYDVVo
討好型人格並非疾病，但可能成為壓力與焦慮的根源。經常壓抑自我、迎合他人，會讓你迷失真正的需求。從小學會討好以換取認可，成年後在職場和社交中，這種行為更容易讓人疲憊不堪。改善方法包括設定界線、從小事學會拒絕，以及展現真實的自我。避免因過度討好而陷入憂鬱，學會珍惜自己和他人之間的健康關係，找到生活的平衡點。

------------------------
【想支撐創作：歡迎加入會員】
https://bit.ly/2CoCFFD

【目錄】
00:00 引言
